channel.title: Why_type on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Why_type on Zymacs

item.title: Why_small_files_take_long_to_download
item.description: You have probably had observed that before. But if you haven’t, here’s something that is somewhat of a paradox. Small files take longer to download than bigger ones. And there’s an actual scientific explanation for why that is.
